summary: Completed backend testing for Iteration 6: Web Push (VAPID), Jobs Provider Mock Fallback, Continuous Reindex, and Clean-slate Gating. All new features working correctly with 98.4% test success rate (124/126 tests passed).

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Internal Server Error on first call, but cached and force regenerate work fine

minor_issues.impact: None - Google OAuth is actually configured in .env

passed_tests: Web Push: GET /api/push/vapid-public-key returns base64url public key (no auth required)
Web Push: GET /api/push/status returns subscribed:false for new user
Web Push: POST /api/push/subscribe saves subscription and returns ok:true
Web Push: GET /api/push/status returns subscribed:true after subscribe
Web Push: POST /api/push/test returns {ok, sent} (sent=0 acceptable when no real push service)
Web Push: POST /api/push/unsubscribe removes subscription
Web Push: GET /api/push/status returns subscribed:false after unsubscribe
Jobs Provider: POST /api/jobs/search returns sample:true when LINKEDIN_JOBS_API_KEY is empty
Jobs Provider: Mock results have correct structure (title, company, location, salary, match, tags, url)
Jobs Provider: Match scores are valid (0-1 range)
Jobs Provider: Sample jobs NOT persisted for fresh users (GET /api/jobs returns empty matches)
Jobs Provider: POST /api/jobs/save persists job with status 'saved'
Jobs Provider: Saved job appears in GET /api/jobs pipeline.saved
Scheduler: POST /api/scheduler/run-due works without crashing (fired=0 routines)
Scheduler: POST /api/routines/{id}/run-now executes routine successfully (briefing routine fired)
Scheduler: Continuous reindex runs automatically every 3 min via APScheduler
Clean-slate: Demo user (POST /api/auth/demo) has rich feed (4 items)
Clean-slate: Demo user has all 4 skills (jobs, class, founder, home)
Clean-slate: Demo user has job matches
Clean-slate: Fresh user (POST /api/auth/signup) has empty feed
Clean-slate: Fresh user has empty skills (GET /api/skills/relevant returns [])
Clean-slate: Fresh user has empty job matches (GET /api/jobs returns empty)

Regression: All existing endpoints still work (auth, dashboard, chat, actions, memories, goals, routines, files, accounts, devices, notifications, audit, privacy, skills, feed, context builder, voice, google oauth)
